title: 10 best herbal teas for sore throat
description: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, teas helps with sore throat because its anti-inflammatory properties reduce swelling and discomfort. The plant's high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids exhibit antimicrobial properties, which help combat infections that cause sore throats. Additionally, Taraxacum officinale tea's soothing and calming effects ease the pain and discomfort associated with a sore throat, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory i...
